zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle32歲，母親Lucy de Brus30歲。他和Matilda Haunsard至少有4個女兒。他去世於1279年5月12日在英國英格蘭越可爾吉爾頓享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton was born about 1255, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, was 32 and his mother, Lucy de Brus, was 30. He had at least 4 daughters with Matilda Haunsard. He died on 12 May 1279, in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton est né environ 1255, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Brus, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Matilda Haunsard. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1279, à Kilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton um 1255 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle 32 und seine Mutter Lucy de Brus 30. Er hatte mit Matilda Haunsard mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1279 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton è nato il circa 1255 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Brus, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Matilda Haunsard. Morì il 12 maggio 1279, nel Kilton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Thweng Lord of Kiltonが約1255年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleは32歳，母Lucy de Brusは30歳であった。彼はMatilda Haunsardとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1279年5月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキルトンで25歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Brus(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Matilda Haunsard(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킬턴에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Brus, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Matilda Haunsard. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1279, em Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton родился около 1255 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Brus, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Matilda Haunsard. Он умер 12 мая 1279 г. в местности килтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Thweng Lord of Kilton nació aproximadamente 1255, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lucy de Brus, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Matilda Haunsard. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1279, en Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
